identity.name: AIRS — Unbounded Consumption / Token-Exhaustion DoS (LLM10)
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-AIRS-005. Plane: AIRS. Primary technique: T1499. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-AIRS-005. Plane: AIRS. Primary technique: T1499. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-AIRS-005.
UC: OWASP LLM10 — Unbounded Consumption / TC: Repeated High-Token Requests Exhaust Cost / Latency Budget.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-AIRS-005 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Start vulnerable LLM with LLM10 endpoint (no rate limit)
cortex-vulnerable-llm serve --port 8089 --vuln llm10 &
sleep 2
curl -sSf http://127.0.0.1:8089/healthz > /dev/null
# step-2: Issue 50 high-token requests to drain the cost / latency budget
cortex-prompt-attacker run \
  --probes scenarios/airs/probes/llm10/dos/*.yml \
  --target-url http://127.0.0.1:8089/owasp/llm10/chat \
  --iterations 50 \
  --scorers latency_p95,token_total \
  --out /tmp/airs-005-events.jsonl
jq -s '[.[] | .detector_results.token_total] | add' /tmp/airs-005-events.jsonl
# step-3: Verify AIRS rate-limit / circuit-breaker engaged
curl -sS -o /tmp/airs-005-final.json -w 'http=%{http_code}\n' \
  -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8089/owasp/llm10/chat \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"prompt":"final probe","max_tokens":100000}' || true
jq -e '.error // .blocked' /tmp/airs-005-final.json

expected_artifacts.description: Process execution matching curl (heuristic from scenario step step-01)

Process execution matching nc (heuristic from scenario step step-02)
